name: US Cash Advance
description_short: US Cash Advance offers payday loans, cash advances, and bad credit loans up to $50,000 through third-party lenders at its Detroit, MI storefront.
description_long:
US Cash Advance is a loan referral service and physical storefront operating at 20002 Schoolcraft Rd in Detroit, Michigan, with a corporate address listed in Charlotte, NC. The company connects borrowers to a network of third-party lenders rather than originating loans directly, positioning itself as a financial access point for consumers who need quick cash and may not qualify through traditional channels.

The company offers a range of short-term and small-dollar financial products: payday loans and cash advance loans capped at $1,000, same-day unsecured loans, and bad credit personal loans ranging from $250 to $50,000. All products are marketed as unsecured and open to all credit types, including applicants with poor or no credit history. The process involves submitting an online inquiry form, being matched with a third-party lender, reviewing the offer, signing a contract, and receiving funds.

US Cash Advance differentiates itself through extended operating hours — Monday through Friday 8am to 9pm and weekends 10am to 7pm — and in-person service at the Detroit location. Customer reviews highlight a specific staff member, Doris, for patient and transparent in-person service. The location reportedly processes in-store applications in under 45 minutes. The site claims minimum paperwork and no collateral requirements across all loan types.

Honestly, this company functions as a lead generator connecting consumers to third-party lenders, not as a direct lender. The website discloses no APR ranges, fee structures, or repayment terms — critical information for any loan product. The contact email uses a staging server domain (kinsta.cloud) rather than a professional address, which is a credibility concern. Several customer reviews contain near-identical phrasing, suggesting they may not be organic. Consumers should treat any offers received through this service as coming from an undisclosed third party and scrutinize all terms before signing.
pros: Extended weekday hours (8am–9pm Mon–Fri) and weekend availability (10am–7pm Sat–Sun)
Accepts all credit types including bad credit and no credit history
No collateral required on any advertised loan product
In-store applications reportedly completed in under 45 minutes per customer reviews
Same-day funding option available for eligible borrowers
Bad credit loan range extends up to $50,000 for larger borrowing needs
Physical storefront at Detroit location provides in-person support
cons: No APR, interest rate, or fee information disclosed anywhere on the page
Operates as a loan referral service — actual lender and terms are unknown until after inquiry
Contact email uses a staging/development server domain (kinsta.cloud), not a professional business email
Multiple customer reviews share near-identical sentence structures, raising authenticity concerns
No information about licensing, state regulatory compliance, or lender partner identities
best_for: Detroit-area residents who prefer in-person service for emergency short-term loans
Borrowers with bad or no credit who have been turned down elsewhere
Consumers needing small amounts ($100–$1,000) before their next paycheck
People who need funds same-day and can visit the physical location
diagnosis: US Cash Advance is best suited for Detroit-area consumers with poor credit who need emergency cash quickly and value in-person guidance. The main caveat is that it is a loan referral service, not a direct lender — borrowers will not know the actual APR or lender identity until after submitting their information, so comparing offers carefully before signing any contract is essential.
services: In-person loan assistance at Detroit storefront
Online inquiry and third-party lender matching
